productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Unisex Black Backpack
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from US Polo. Neatly designed with lots of organiser space and laptop compartment, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to college or office.MeasurementHeight : 40cm Width : 38cmDepth : 14cm  Made of polyester with a nylon lining for durability, toughness and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a removable,padded laptop compartment with a velcro closure and zippered mesh pouch One small zippered compartment on the front for enhanced space Zippered utility pocket on the front with organizing pouches, loop, mobile pouch and four credit card slots, three pen slots and a zippered mesh pouch US Polo badge appliqued on the front Mesh pockets on the sides for carrying a sipper and essentials Synthetic, padded haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Care Hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine wash, tumble dry, wring or line dryaccessories shown in the image does not come along with the backpack
